title: Senior Plant Manager at Supreme Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Supreme Industries
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!
